title: viola viarum
intro: Viola viarum, also known as the common pansy or heartsease, is a flowering plant species in the viola genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as relieving symptoms of colds and flu, as well as soothing digestive issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal preparations of Viola viarum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
